headline: Atmos Energy (ATO) Valuation Check As Shares Sit Near Highs And Legal Risks Emerge
summary: Stock performance snapshot and business profile Atmos Energy (ATO) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with a 1 day return of 0.9%, a past week decline of 2.2%, and a modest gain over the past month. Over the past 3 months, Atmos Energy shows a 10.3% total return, contributing to a 21.9% 1 year total return and longer term 3 year and 5 year total returns of 74.8% and very large multiples respectively.
